name: Large meeting room
description:
Os preços incluem:
Serviço de Receção, TV LCD, Internet Wireless, Logitech Video Conference System (quando disponível), Cafés (nº de cafés de acordo com a capacidade da sala) e Àguas.
--
Included in the price:
Reception Service, LCD TV, Internet Wireless, Whiteboard, Logitech Video Conference System (when available), Coffees (number of coffees according to room capacity) and waters.
